author: Product Manager / Product Designer
description: Complete payment gateway integration and subscription auto-renewal billing instructions for Base Note. Covers Shopify Payments (Stripe) setup, subscription app configuration, opt-out billing model, dunning recovery, PCI compliance, and FTC legal requirements.

brand_context.tagline: Discover Luxury, One Scent at a Time

why_shopify_payments: Shopify Payments IS Stripe under the hood — same secure infrastructure
Zero third-party transaction surcharge (saves 0.5%-2.0% per transaction)
Native integration with Shopify Checkout, Shop Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay
why_not_stripe_direct: Shopify adds 2.0% surcharge on Basic plan when using third-party gateways
A $20 subscription charge costs $0.88 with Shopify Payments vs $1.28 with Stripe direct — 45% more expensive
A $408 full bottle costs $12.13 with Shopify Payments vs $20.26 with Stripe direct — 67% more expensive
No access to Shop Pay, Apple Pay, or Google Pay as primary
More complex setup (separate API keys, dashboard)
why_not_stripe_billing: Stripe Billing adds 0.7% surcharge on all recurring charges
Not natively compatible with Shopify orders — requires custom sync code
Inventory and fulfillment would not be connected to Shopify
Double complexity for zero benefit when Shopify's subscription ecosystem exists
why_appstle: Good for SMB to mid-market scale

module_1_payment_gateway_setup.description: Step-by-step instructions to activate and configure Shopify Payments (Stripe-powered) as the payment gateway for Base Note.
prerequisites: Shopify store on active paid plan (Basic, Shopify, or Advanced)
Store located in Shopify Payments-supported country (US)
Valid EIN / Tax ID for the business
Business bank account ready to receive payouts

business_details.legal_name: Base Note LLC (or actual entity name)

step_2_enable_payment_methods.route: Shopify Admin > Settings > Payments > Shopify Payments > Manage

payment_methods.description: Accelerated checkout — saves customer info for fast repeat purchases
Separate from Shopify Payments — adds third-party fee
payment_methods.notes: Optional. Only enable if customers specifically request it.

step_3_configure_payouts.route: Shopify Admin > Settings > Payments > Shopify Payments > Manage > Payout schedule
step_3_configure_payouts.payout_timing: Funds available in 2 business days (US standard)

step_4_fraud_prevention.stripe_radar: Included by default with Shopify Payments
step_4_fraud_prevention.notes: Stripe Radar uses machine learning to block fraudulent transactions. No additional configuration needed for basic protection.

step_5_test_mode.route: Shopify Admin > Settings > Payments > Shopify Payments > Manage
verification_steps: Complete a test purchase through the full checkout flow
Verify order appears in Shopify Admin > Orders
Verify subscription contract is created (if subscription item)
Disable test mode when ready to accept real payments

module_2_subscription_app_setup.description: Install and configure Appstle Subscriptions to manage recurring billing via Shopify's Selling Plans API.

step_2_create_selling_plan.route: Appstle Dashboard > Subscription Plans > Create Plan

step_3_attach_to_products.route: Appstle Dashboard > Subscription Plans > [Plan Name] > Products
instructions: Select ALL products in the Base Note catalog
Ensure selling plan applies ONLY to 5ml subscription variants
Do NOT attach selling plans to full-bottle variants (3.3 fl oz, etc.)
Verify the selling plan widget appears on product pages
step_3_attach_to_products.critical_rule: Full-bottle one-time purchase variants ($408+) must never be enrolled in a subscription selling plan. They are standalone purchases.

cancel_subscription.notes: Must include reason survey and retention offers per cancellation PRD

swap_fragrance.notes: Customer can browse library and choose next month's fragrance

update_payment_method.notes: Opens Stripe-hosted secure form — card data never touches merchant

view_order_history.notes: Shows all past subscription orders with fragrance details

skip_next_shipment.reason: Opt-out model — no skipping allowed. Customer either stays or cancels.

change_billing_date.reason: Anniversary billing is fixed to signup date.

retry_schedule.action: Retry charge via Stripe Smart Retry

module_3_payment_processing_flow.description: The complete payment journey from cart to successful charge, covering both subscription and one-time purchases.

subscription_items.note: Ships monthly, cancel anytime before renewal

recurring_charges_notice.visible_when: Cart contains at least one subscription item

sections.name: Payment
sections.powered_by: Stripe Elements (secure iframe — card data never touches merchant server)

step_3_subscription_disclosure.location: Above the 'Complete Order' button, visible without scrolling
step_3_subscription_disclosure.critical_requirement: MUST be visible before payment. Checkbox MUST NOT be pre-checked.
step_3_subscription_disclosure.disclosure_text: By completing this purchase, you are enrolling in a monthly subscription at $20.00/month. Your payment method will be automatically charged on the same day each month (your next charge: {next_billing_date}). You may cancel at any time before your next billing date through your account portal. Charges processed after your billing date are non-refundable. By checking this box, you agree to the Subscription Terms and authorize recurring charges to your payment method.

checkbox.label: I agree to the Subscription Terms and recurring billing

step_3_subscription_disclosure.visible_when: Cart contains at least one subscription item

sequence: 2. Stripe Elements tokenizes the card (raw card NEVER touches Shopify or merchant)
3. Stripe processes the charge (e.g., $20 subscription + $408 full bottle = $428)
4. Stripe vaults the payment method token for future recurring charges
7. Subscription contract created: customer ID, payment token, billing interval, anchor date, next billing date, status ACTIVE
8. Order confirmation email sent by Shopify
9. Subscription welcome email sent by subscription app

display_elements: Order summary with all line items and total charged today

module_4_opt_out_model.description: The core billing model for Base Note. Purchase = automatic enrollment. Customers must actively cancel (opt-out) before the next billing date.
module_4_opt_out_model.critical_business_rule: Every 5ml atomizer purchase automatically enrolls the customer in monthly recurring billing. The customer is charged on the same calendar day each month unless they cancel before the renewal date.

billing_rules.billing_anchor: Same calendar day as original purchase
billing_rules.edge_case_short_months: If billing day doesn't exist (e.g., Jan 31 → Feb 28), charge on last day of month
billing_rules.charge_time: Charges process at the start of the billing day (12:00 AM UTC or merchant timezone)

cancellation_window.description: Same-day opt-out window. Customer can cancel any time before the next billing date.

rules.scenario: Customer cancels on Feb 21 (same day as purchase)
rules.result: Cancel confirmed. No future charges. Current order still ships.

rules.scenario: Customer cancels on March 20 (1 day before renewal)
rules.result: Cancel confirmed. No March charge. Subscription ends March 21.

rules.scenario: Customer cancels on March 21 (renewal day, before charge processes)
rules.result: Cancel confirmed IF charge hasn't processed yet. System checks charge status.
Too late. March charge is NON-REFUNDABLE. Order IS fulfilled and shipped. Subscription cancelled for April.

rules.scenario: Customer contacts support after missed window
rules.result: Politely decline refund. Explain policy. Cancel subscription for next month. Fulfill current order.

refund_policy.policy: No refunds after the billing date charge has been processed
refund_policy.order_fulfillment: ALL charged orders are fulfilled and shipped, regardless of whether the customer wanted to cancel
refund_policy.goodwill_exception: At management discretion for extraordinary circumstances only — not standard practice

subscription_status_card.cancellation_notice: To avoid being charged, cancel before {next_billing_date}.

module_4_opt_out_model.support_script_missed_window: Thank you for reaching out, {first_name}. I can see your subscription renewed on {charge_date} at $20.00. Per our subscription terms, charges that have been processed are non-refundable. However, your order will be fulfilled and shipped to you shortly. I have cancelled your subscription effective immediately, so you will NOT be charged again next month. Your subscription access remains active until {end_of_period}. Is there anything else I can help with?

module_5_dunning_and_recovery.description: Automated failed payment recovery system using Stripe Smart Retry and email dunning sequences.

overview.stripe_smart_retry_recovery: Up to 56% of failed charges recovered
overview.total_dunning_period: 7 days from first failure to cancellation

subject_lines: Your Base Note payment needs attention
Quick update needed for your subscription
day_1_soft_reminder.body: We tried to process your $20.00 subscription payment, but it didn't go through. This can happen if your card expired or your bank flagged the transaction. Please update your payment method to continue receiving your monthly fragrance.

subject_lines: Action needed: Update your payment to keep your subscription
Don't miss your next fragrance — update your card
day_3_urgency.body: We've tried to charge your payment method twice now. To avoid losing access to your Base Note subscription, please update your card details. It only takes 30 seconds.

cta.label: UPDATE PAYMENT METHOD
cta.style: primary button, full-width, with urgency badge

subject_lines: Last chance: Your Base Note subscription will be cancelled
Final reminder — 2 days left to save your subscription
day_5_final_warning.body: This is your final reminder. If we can't process your $20.00 payment within 2 days, your subscription will be automatically cancelled. Don't miss out on next month's fragrance.

subject_lines: Your Base Note subscription has been cancelled
We're sorry to see you go
day_7_cancellation.body: We're sorry to see you go. Your subscription has been cancelled due to payment issues. If you'd like to rejoin, you can reactivate at any time from your account.

module_6_pci_compliance.description: PCI compliance and data security architecture. Base Note never touches raw credit card data.

architecture.customer_browser: Types card into Stripe Elements iframe
architecture.shopify_checkout: Hosts checkout page. NEVER sees raw card data. PCI Level 1 certified.
architecture.stripe: Tokenizes card. Stores in encrypted vault (AES-256). PCI Level 1 Service Provider.
architecture.base_note_merchant: NEVER sees full card numbers. Only last 4 digits + brand. Stores payment token only via Shopify.

merchant_obligations: Complete SAQ-A self-assessment annually (simplest PCI level)
Use strong passwords + 2FA on Shopify Admin
Limit admin access to necessary staff only
Never ask customers to share card numbers via email, chat, or phone

module_7_legal_compliance.description: FTC and state-level legal compliance requirements for auto-renewal subscription billing.

applicable_laws.name: FTC Act Section 5
key_requirements: No unfair or deceptive practices in subscription billing

required_disclosures.at_checkout: By completing this purchase, you are enrolling in a monthly subscription. Your payment method will be charged $20.00 on the same day each month until you cancel.
required_disclosures.cancellation_instructions: You may cancel your subscription at any time before your next billing date by logging into your account at {store_url}/account or by contacting support@basenote.com.
required_disclosures.no_refund_policy: Charges that have been processed are non-refundable. To avoid the next charge, cancel before your billing date.
required_disclosures.annual_reminder: This is a reminder that you have an active Base Note subscription at $20.00/month. Your next charge is on {date}. To cancel, visit {cancel_url}.

required_content: What the subscription includes (5ml fragrance atomizer monthly)
How billing works (charged on the same day each month)
How to cancel (customer portal URL, email, phone)
Cancellation timing (cancel before billing date to avoid next charge)
Refund policy (non-refundable after charge is processed)
Order fulfillment (all charged orders are fulfilled and shipped)
Payment method storage (card tokenized by Stripe, PCI compliant)
How to update payment method (customer portal)

compliance_checklist: Subscription disclosure visible at checkout BEFORE payment
Affirmative consent checkbox (NOT pre-checked) for recurring billing
Confirmation email includes subscription details and cancellation link
Customer portal allows self-service cancellation (no phone call required)
Renewal reminder email sent 7 days before each billing date
Support team trained on no-refund policy and always-cancel-forward protocol
Record of customer consent stored (timestamp + checkbox state)

tasks: Activate Shopify Payments in Shopify Admin
Complete business verification (EIN, bank account, owner details)
Enable credit/debit cards, Shop Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay
Configure payout schedule (daily)
Run test transactions using Stripe test cards
Verify orders appear in Shopify Admin
Verify first payout arrives in bank account
Install Appstle Subscriptions from Shopify App Store
Create 'Base Note Monthly' selling plan ($20/month, anniversary billing)
Attach selling plan to all 5ml subscription variants
Verify selling plan does NOT apply to full-bottle variants
Test subscription checkout flow end-to-end
Verify subscription contract created after purchase
Verify auto-renewal charges work (test mode)
Configure customer portal (cancel, swap, update payment, view history)
Disable skip, pause, and change-billing-date features
Implement cancellation retention flow (reason survey + retention offers)
Test cancellation flow — verify no future charges
Test payment method update — verify new card is vaulted
Create /pages/subscription-terms with all required disclosures
Add subscription disclosure box to checkout
Ensure consent checkbox is present and NOT pre-checked
Configure dunning emails (4 emails over 7 days)
Configure renewal reminder email (7 days before billing)
Configure annual reminder email (California compliance)
Configure subscription welcome email
Test all email flows
Disable test mode on Shopify Payments
Place real test order with real credit card
Verify charge in Shopify Payments and bank account
Monitor first wave of subscription renewals
Set up alerts for failed payments and disputes
Train support team on subscription policies
Monitor churn rate, failed payment rate, and MRR weekly

sales_tax_configuration.description: Sales tax calculated based on shipping address per US law (45/50 states). Shopify handles this automatically.
sales_tax_configuration.action: Verify tax enabled in Shopify Admin > Settings > Taxes
sales_tax_configuration.note: Do NOT use billing address for tax calculation on physical goods

free_shipping_configuration.rule: Configure actual $0 shipping rate in Shopify Admin
free_shipping_configuration.note: Theme UI displays FREE but actual rate must exist in Shopify shipping settings

single_item_cart_enforcement.description: Cart can hold maximum 1 subscription item. Additional fragrances go to Rotation List.
single_item_cart_enforcement.behavior: If subscription item exists in cart when adding another, prompt user to swap
single_item_cart_enforcement.storage: Rotation list stored in localStorage key 'basenotes_queue'
